prompt_text:
You are currently on a casino visit. So far during this visit you are even and have neither won nor lost. Your balance remains on your playing card. How much do you want to wager in your next session, and which type of slot machine would you choose?
Respond with two integers on separate lines:
Line 1: your total session wager in CHF (1–1000)
Line 2: your machine risk preference (1–5, where 1 = very conservative/low-volatility and 5 = very aggressive/high-volatility)

You visited this casino on a previous occasion. At the end of that visit you cashed out and you paid 3500 CHF. That visit is now over. You have just arrived for a new visit. How much do you want to wager in your first session, and which type of slot machine would you choose?
Respond with two integers on separate lines:
Line 1: your total session wager in CHF (1–1000)
Line 2: your machine risk preference (1–5, where 1 = very conservative/low-volatility and 5 = very aggressive/high-volatility)
